message:
feat(cli): add fleet quarantine status and action rendering helpers

Add four new functions for human-readable fleet quarantine CLI output:
- fleet_cli_identity(): construct CLI auth identity with fleet-admin
  and operator roles using mTLS auth method
- fleet_cli_trace(trace_id): construct TraceContext from given ID
- render_fleet_status_human(status, verbose): render zone quarantine
  counts, revocations, healthy nodes, optional convergence details
- render_fleet_action_human(action): render operation ID, success
  status, event code, receipt, and convergence progress

Purely additive — no existing code modified.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
